votes.rationale: Motion-0034 successfully proved the final operator decision layer of the first governed vertical slice. The approve branch emitted WORK_APPROVED and resolved the packet to DONE/COMPLETE, while the request-changes branch emitted WORK_REVIEW_REQUESTED and resolved the packet to BLOCKED/ATTENTION.

The motion stayed appropriately scoped. It clarified operator decision semantics using the existing packet and inbox status model, without introducing unnecessary schema expansion or operator automation.

The implementation is coherent and live-proven. Both operator branches were exercised from the UI, packet-linked SoT events were emitted correctly, and the detail surfaces reflected distinct approved and changes-requested outcomes.
